message:
fix(server,share): remove premature name filter in archive browser directory scan and reformat snapshot match arm

The archive browser's scan_directory_filtered was applying a
case-insensitive name match (contains_ci) on directory entries before
pushing them into the items list, which caused directories to be
unexpectedly hidden when a filter string was active since parent
directories that don't match the filter but contain matching children
were excluded. Removing the early filter defers filtering to the
appropriate downstream stage that has full tree context.

- Remove 6-line contains_ci filter block from scan_directory_filtered
  in archive_browser.rs, restoring full directory enumeration before
  downstream filtering
- Reformat single-line Err match arm in snapshot.rs into multi-line
  block with braces for style consistency with surrounding non-trivial
  match arms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
